title: podospermum laciniatum var. intermedium
intro: Podospermum laciniatum var. intermedium, also known as a variety of the lesser calamint, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Podospermum laciniatum var. intermedium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and soothe digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
